name: Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Detected
description: Detection of a renamed ZOHO Dctask64 binary. ZOHO Dctask64 is a legitimate utility but has been abused by attackers, specifically the REvil/Sodinokibi ransomware group, for lateral movement. Adversaries may rename it to evade detection. This detection looks for a known hash or file size of ZOHO Dctask64 when executed under a different name.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the execution of the renamed ZOHO Dctask64 binary on host `{hostname}` at `{timestamp}`. The original binary was ZOHO Dctask64, but it was executed as `{renamed_binary}`. The command line detected was `{command_line}`. Analyze the user (`{user_name}`) who executed the command and the destination host (`{destination_host}`). Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action or a malicious attempt at lateral movement. Provide a summary of the findings and suggest immediate containment and remediation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the renamed ZOHO Dctask64 was executed.

parameters.name: renamed_binary
parameters.description: The new name of the ZOHO Dctask64 binary.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the renamed binary.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: destination_host
parameters.description: The destination host where ZOHO Dctask64 attempted to establish a session.
